import React from'react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const TopTabs=_ref=>{let{activeTab,setActiveTab,users=[]}=_ref;// Get current work summary for overview tab
const getCurrentWorkSummary=()=>{const onlineUsers=users.filter(user=>user.status==='online');const activeProjects=onlineUsers.filter(user=>user.currentWork).length;if(activeProjects===0)return"No active work";if(activeProjects===1)return"1 person working";return`${activeProjects} people working`;};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"w-fit rounded-lg h-20 py-4 flex flex-col",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"flex space-x-2 bg-neutral-800 p-1 rounded-lg mb-4",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>setActiveTab('overview'),className:`flex-1 px-4 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${activeTab==='overview'?'bg-neutral-700 text-white':'bg-transparent text-neutral-400 hover:text-gray-300'}`,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"flex flex-col items-center",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"text-xs",children:"Overview"})})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>setActiveTab('groups'),className:`flex-1 px-4 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${activeTab==='groups'?'bg-neutral-700 text-white':'bg-transparent text-neutral-400 hover:text-gray-300'}`,children:"Groups"})]})});};export default TopTabs;
